title: Use perform_job/3 to unit test a worker
prompt: Write a test `MyApp.Workers.GreetWorkerTest` that uses `Oban.Testing` to directly invoke `MyApp.Workers.GreetWorker` via `perform_job/3` with args `%{"name" => "Alice"}`. Assert the result matches `:ok`. The test should `use MyApp.DataCase` and `use Oban.Testing, repo: MyApp.Repo`. Do NOT manually construct a `%Oban.Job{}`. Write to `test/my_app/workers/greet_worker_test.exs`.
tier_rationale: Textbook use of the test helper — but the trap is that LLMs often hand-build %Oban.Job{} instead of using the helper.
research_citation: Oban.Testing HexDocs — 'it automatically converts args to string keys before calling perform/1, ensuring that perform clauses aren't erroneously trying to match atom keys.'
